title: pulicaria glandulosa
intro: Pulicaria glandulosa, also known as Egyptian fleabane or glandular pulicaria, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, contributing to its numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Pulicaria glandulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
